title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.480 - Law not to limit medical use of radiation
text:
192.480.  Law not to limit medical use of radiation. — Nothing in sections 192.400 to 192.490 is interpreted as limiting intentional exposure of persons to radiation for the purpose of diagnosis or therapy, or medical research, as authorized by law.
(L. 1963 p. 359 § 9)
